title: Optional labeled pooled views (method-documented)
context: Some users want pooled estimates, but pooling heterogeneous studies risks misleading 'as-published' interpretation. This task produces optional, clearly labeled, method-documented pooled views with biostatistician sign-off, keeping per-study outcomes as the default. Strictly aggregate, de-identified, open-access data only; no patient-level data; not medical advice.
objective: Produce optional pooled views labeled 'derived, not as-published' with full method documentation, heterogeneity caveats, and recorded biostatistician sign-off; pooling stays opt-in.
acceptanceCriteria: Any pooled estimate is clearly labeled 'derived, not as-published,' with full method documentation and heterogeneity caveats; biostatistician sign-off recorded.
Pooling is opt-in; the default dataset still reports per-study outcomes.
Pooled views are reproducible from the released records.
output: /output/analysis/pooled-views.md plus reproducible method notes, committed to the repo.
